title: English Grammar Foundations
description: Build core grammar skills: nouns, verbs, tense consistency, and sentence structure.

title: Parts of Speech Mastery
description: Identify and correctly use nouns, pronouns, verbs, adjectives, adverbs, and prepositions.

title: Reading Comprehension Strategies
description: Use skimming, scanning, and inference to understand informational and narrative texts.

title: Academic Vocabulary Development
description: Expand high-frequency academic vocabulary and apply words accurately in context.

title: Paragraph Writing
description: Write clear paragraphs with topic sentences, supporting details, and effective transitions.

title: Essay Writing and Argumentation
description: Plan and write multi-paragraph essays with claims, evidence, and coherent structure.

title: Listening for Main Ideas
description: Identify main ideas and supporting details from spoken English in classroom contexts.

title: Oral Presentation Skills
description: Deliver structured presentations with clear pronunciation, pacing, and audience awareness.
